# Pro Built Construction Inc.

> Licensed, bonded, and insured general contractor in Gillette, Wyoming. Over 30 years of experience. Family-run. No outsourced labor. Founded 1991 by Bryan Miller.

## Services

- New Construction: Custom homes, spec builds, room additions, commercial buildings, design-build
- Concrete & Flatwork: Driveways, foundations, slabs, flatwork, stamped and broom finishes, demo and replacement
- Excavation & Earthwork: Site clearing, trenching, utilities, grading, compaction, basement digs
- Snow Removal: 24/7 on-call plowing, residential and commercial, salting, seasonal contracts
- Remodeling: Kitchen remodels, bathroom remodels, painting, drywall, flooring, custom cabinetry
- Lawn & Landscape: Mowing, trimming, fertilization, sprinkler maintenance, landscaping install
- Parking & Site Care: Sweeping, striping, sealcoating, asphalt repair, maintenance packages

## Service Area

Gillette, Wright, Moorcroft, Newcastle, Sundance, Sheridan, Ranchester, Casper, Cheyenne, Wyoming and surrounding areas.
